title: Outside Main Wall Smoke (Front)
notes: Part one of the standard multi-smoke wall. Shuts down the deep garage/CT red yard sightlines.

title: Outside Main Wall Smoke (Back/Secret Link)
notes: Part two of the defensive screen line. Overlaps with the front smoke to create a safe cross entirely down into Secret.

title: Ramp / Trophy Room Entry Molotov
notes: Flushes out aggressive CT shotgun or rifle setups holding tight angles directly at the bottom of the Ramp layout.

title: Squeaky Door Anti-Rush Smoke
notes: Locks down the Squeaky door threshold immediately, preventing fast inner A site vent-dive strategies.

title: Outside Cross Counter-Molotov
notes: Thrown over Mini roof structure to land deep inside the T-yard crossing lane, breaking their wall setup timings.

title: Top Hut / Mustang Molotov (From T-Roof)
notes: Essential for fast A rushes. Spreads across the entire top roof structure of Hut to completely flush out the close anchor. Crucial note: ensure the roof skylight glass is broken before throwing!
